cn-site-ops.default_prompt: Use $cn-site-ops to rescan the site, repair static regressions, and prepare or perform Aplus deployment.

cn-review-refresh.default_prompt: Use $cn-review-refresh to audit weak review pages, remap them to the right `.docx`, and regenerate stronger summaries.

cn-seo-audit.default_prompt: Use $cn-seo-audit to inspect the static site for SEO gaps, repair metadata and sitemap issues, and keep navigation intact.

cn-video-marketing.default_prompt: Use $cn-video-marketing to turn a review or topic into a verified YouTube concept, NotebookLM packet, and companion page.

cn-edit-triage.default_prompt: Use $cn-edit-triage to process edit requests, fix what agents can confirm, and escalate only unresolved cases.

cn-update-manager.default_prompt: Use $cn-update-manager to inspect changed files, run the required follow-up generators and audits, and prepare the site for deployment.
